content.en:
Ye Tian sent a replica body directly to the Abyss of Despair, he wanted to go to the Abyss of Despair to find an opportunity, if he could find a treasure similar to the Eternal Demon Pillar or beyond the Eternal Demon Pillar, it would be comfortable.

After some time, Ye Tian arrived in the area near the Abyss of Despair.

Then.

A gray aura permeated the air, and all perception in front of it seemed to be blocked, and the shuttle here seemed to be full of endless despair.

These auras had been influencing his Eternal Dao Species, but they couldn't.

The closer he got to the Abyss of Despair, the stronger the effect became, but no matter how the aura of the Abyss of Despair affected, it was impossible for him to become a demon.

Of course.

Even if the Perfect-level Eternal Dao Species stayed here for a long time, and were affected by these aura, the foundation would be affected.

That is, Ye Tian, he didn't care about copying his body, so he dared to enter here.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to come to the abyss of despair.

The aura of the abyss of despair here was incomparably strong, making Ye Tiandu frown slightly.

"No wonder I don't dare to come here in the Eternal Realm God Realm, even if I am not a perfect-level Eternal Dao Species, I can't last here for long!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Then, without hesitation, he shuttled into the abyss of despair.

......

In the abyss of despair.

Ye Tian moved forward slowly, he didn't know anything about this place, and even the Realm Court didn't have much information about the Abyss of Despair.

Maybe some of the Eternal Realm God Realm knows a lot, but they won't tell him.

Suddenly.

A demon seed stared at Ye Tian.

"The demon seed of the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm is not powerful!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Rumble!!!

This demon seed has been killed, and the other party doesn't have much wisdom, so it's not as good as the demon seed Linyuan.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian used the grip of the sun, directly crushed the opponent, and killed him in seconds.

Subsequently, Ye Tian began to explore in the abyss of despair, looking for resources.

In a few moments, he discovered something good.

"Evil Vine !!!"

Ye Tian saw that on a cliff, there were evil vines growing, and it was not one, but three evil vines!

Swish!

He flew over and immediately gathered away the evil vines.

"That's right, I just came in and harvested three evil vines, any one of which is enough to make an ordinary Eternal (CGBC) Realm God Realm greedy!"

Ye Tian smiled.

However, for him, the evil vines are just like that.

After all, he has a better Eternal Demon Pillar, but he wants as many treasures as the Evil Vines.

He doesn't need it, but it can be used for trading, no matter how bad it is, the human race will give birth to more Eternal Realm Divine Realms, and it will also be possible to give the Eternal Realm Divine Realm to the human race!

Immediately afterward, he continued to explore the abyss of despair.

From time to time, half-step Eternal Realm Divine Realm demon seeds would attack him, and they were all killed by him one by one.

"There is no demon seed of the Eternal Realm God Realm attacking me!"

Ye Tian naturally didn't think that there was no Eternal Realm God Realm Demon Seed here, and it was obviously hidden.

"Almost all of the demon seeds in the Eternal Realm God Realm have wisdom, and they may still be thinking about dealing with me!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

......

Deep in the abyss of despair.

A group of Eternal Realm Demon Seeds sat together to start the meeting.

"Lord Gu Dusk, an Eternal Realm God Realm Dao Seed has entered our Abyss of Despair!" said a demon seed.

The demon seed calls those strong people who have condensed the eternal Dao seed and have not been transformed by the demon seed as the Dao seed, just like those strong people call them the demon seed, and the names are similar.

"Looks like we're all going to have one more companion!"

Demon Seed Gu Du said with a smile.

"As long as he doesn't leave, don't worry about him, the Dao Seed won't stay in our Despair Abyss for long, and it will definitely turn into a demon. Demon Seed Gu Dusk said again.

"Yes yes yes !!!"

The other demon seeds hurriedly responded.

In this way, time passed slowly, and Ye Tian had never encountered the demon seed of the Eternal Realm God Realm, but he had gained a lot of resources.

this day.

Because he knew very well that those Eternal Realm Demon Seeds would definitely attack him.

Swish!

Ye Tian left quickly, and just as he was about to get out of the abyss of despair, two demon seeds of the Eternal Realm God Realm intercepted Ye Tian.

"Sure enough, the Eternal Realm God Realm Demon Seed has appeared!"

Ye Tian stopped and faced the two Eternal Realm God Realm demon seeds.

"Dao seed, hurry up and take the initiative to transform into a demon seed, become our companion, and we won't kill you!"

One of the Eternal Realm God Realm Demon Seeds said.

"Look for death!"

Ye Tian and these two demon seeds were killed.

The strength of these two demon seeds is not weak, although there is no spirit of the demon seed, but their strength is much stronger than that of the Xuanze Realm God, and they can be called powerful in the ordinary Eternal Realm God Realm.

However, in Ye Tian's eyes, it was not worth mentioning.

"Sunrise Domain!"

"Prison of the Sun!"

Ye Tian trapped these two demon seeds in an instant, and then cast the Spear of the Ruin Sun, piercing one of the demon seeds with a single blow, killing it in an instant.

When the other demon saw it, it showed a look of fear.

He wanted to escape, but he couldn't.

Ye Tian poked it with another blow and easily killed it.

In this way, the two Eternal Realm God Realm Demon Seeds died like this, and the resources on these two Demon Seeds also belonged to Ye Tian.

Swish!

Ye Tian left quickly, and he was far away from here in the blink of an eye.

Because he had sensed a terrifying aura, it was definitely not an ordinary demon seed, much stronger than him, if he didn't leave, he wouldn't want to leave.

Soon.

Ye Tian got rid of the other party, mainly because the other party didn't dare to chase him out.

That demon seed is also afraid of being a trap, if it is chased and killed, it will be surrounded and killed by the top Eternal Realm God Realm, then it will be dead.

And staying in the abyss of despair, the top Eternal Realm God Realm did not dare to kill it.

......

"Damn Dao Seed, you actually killed two of us Eternal Realm God Realm Demon Seed!"

Demon Seed Gu Du said angrily.

One after another, the demon seeds of the Eternal Realm God Realm appeared one after another, and let out a roar of rage.

Distance.

Ye Tian stopped and began to check the treasure resources of the two demon seeds.

"It's worthy of the demon seed of the abyss of despair, and there are a lot of good things on it!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

There are quite a few treasures similar to evil vines, and this kind of treasure is not very useful to the demon seed, so they don't care, it seems that it is an ordinary resource for them.

"It's ......"

Ye Tian's gaze focused on a crimson spear, which was a wooden spear that belonged to one of the demon species, but before the other party could take it out, he killed it in seconds.

Ye Tian was able to sense a terrifying energy from this spear, and the amount was not as much as the Eternal Demon Pillar, but its quality surpassed the Eternal Demon Pillar.
